name: Koyosha Inc.
summary: Koyosha Inc. plans and designs DTP, plate, printing, and digital content production and display products in Japan. The company provides H-UV 8-color double-sided printing machines; environmentally friendly printing solutions; wide color gamut printing, image correction and photo retouching, e-book creation, and stereoscopic photography services; and UV inkjet, solvent inkjet, antibacterial/antiviral/deodorant functional inkjet, LIMEX, and functional antibacterial varnish printing solutions. It also offers business support services; and produces novelties. Koyosha Inc. was incorporated in 1949 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
